metadata.name: Find and Interpret System Journal Log Entries
metadata.description: Find log entries of the system journal by using different criteria to review the system status
objectives: Search the system journal for entries to record events based on different criteria

tasks.name: Verify journalctl is accessible
tasks.description: The journalctl command should be available for querying system logs
tasks.success_message: journalctl is working and system journal is accessible
hints: This is an observational exercise - verify you can run journalctl commands
Try: journalctl _PID=1 to view systemd entries
